Lots of wild blackberry along river in this area, even along road before entering park. Ripens late summer. Watch for thorns. Falling Fruit season: July-August.

There is a stand of blackberry bushes here where the road turns in to the parking along the foot trail.  This is public land.  I called the county when I harvested two years ago and was informed they were available to the public.  I picked 4 quarts of berries
